_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of organizational human resource policies, processes, and procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data policy authoring, including policy structure standards, enforcement mechanisms, exception handling processes, and policy lifecycle management.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-009 (LS, cosine: 0.494), LS-K-004 (LS, cosine: 0.467).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.573). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, processes]. DCWF-only terms [human, organizational, policies, procedures, resource] vs WIDAI-only terms [authoring, data, enforcement, exception, handling, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.910 (P=0.937, R=0.884). P exceeds R by 0.053 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of organizational human resource policies, processes, and procedures." and "Knowledge of data policy authoring, including policy structure standards, enforc". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.502 < STS 0.573 (gap -0.072). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [human, organizational, policies] and [authoring, data, enforcement] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, processes]. DCWF-only: [human, organizational, policies, procedures, resource]. WIDAI-only: [authoring, data, enforcement, exception, handling, lifecycle].
